expectedFindings.semanticSummary: Incorrect end time calculation using slotStartTime instead of slotEndTime

Using === for dayjs object comparison will always return false as it compares object references, not values. Use .isSame() method instead: dayjs(date.start).add(utcOffset, 'minutes').isSame(dayjs(date.end).add(utcOffset, minutes))

expectedNoFindingZones.reason: Fixture preamble and unchanged scaffolding should not produce review findings.
